name: worker-orchestration
description: Coordinator orchestrates workers via AgentTool spawning. Workers are autonomous and report back via task-notification XML. Key tools: AgentTool (spawn), SendMessageTool (continue), TaskStopTool (stop). Coordinator synthesizes research findings before delegating implementation - never pass understanding to workers.

name: Multi-Agent Orchestration
description: Coordinator mode (CLAUDE_CODE_COORDINATOR_MODE=1) uses AgentTool to spawn workers, SendMessageTool to continue them. Workers get task-notification XML responses. getCoordinatorSystemPrompt() in coordinatorMode.ts now reads from canopy cache at .claude/.coordinator-prompt-cache with fallback.
